name: Gloam Bridge

sensory_description.sight: Black water sliding under a rope bridge hung with rain and funeral knots.
sensory_description.sound: Creaking planks and the dull slap of current against rotting pilings.

notable_features: The ferryman's post can hide a hand-sized satchel.
Old survey marks are carved into the downstream railing.
hidden_elements: A bloodied seal-ring wedged beneath the signal post.
Fresh boot-scrapes where someone climbed below the bridge.
plot_beats: Identify who reached the bridge first
